title: sutera marifolia
intro: Sutera marifolia, also known as the 'Marigold Flower', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Sutera, a group of herbs in the family Scrophulariaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sutera marifolia include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections, as well as its use as a natural remedy for fever reduction and digestive issues. Sutera marifolia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to create topical creams and ointments for skin and wound care.
